content: The incremental open-ended search for high-impact unlabeled data that defines 2024–2025 state-of-the-art active learning agent memory can be reframed as a recursive self-improvement loop where the agent’s own structural uncertainty about its memory becomes the intrinsic curiosity signal that drives new data selection. This means an agent’s active memory system does not just store data for future tasks—it generates its own learning objectives by measuring how unpredictable its own memory retrieval outcomes are.
